name: palo-governance-server
disclaimer: Reference MCP contract and implementation for isolated evaluation only. It is not a production authorization service, trusted execution boundary, exactly-once executor, authenticated approval service, compliance certification, or production evidence platform.
persistence: Prototype SQLite WAL store with FULL synchronous commits and append-only evidence triggers; cross-state atomicity, backup, retention, and tamper-resistant anchoring are not provided.
authentication: A shared bearer token is mandatory for Streamable HTTP and REST testing. It does not provide principal identity, RBAC, administrative authorization, reviewer authentication, rotation, rate limiting, or TLS termination.

environment.PALO_OPA_URL: Required for reference evaluation; absence or outage returns a denial response.
environment.PALO_HMAC_KEYS_JSON: Protected keyId-to-secret map; each secret must contain at least 32 bytes.
environment.PALO_MCP_HTTP_TOKEN: Bearer token of at least 24 bytes for Streamable HTTP.
environment.PALO_GATEWAY_TOKEN: Bearer token of at least 24 bytes for the connector REST gateway.

tools.name: palo_register_agent
tools.contract: locally registered versioned agent and authority profile; publisher identity is not authenticated

tools.name: palo_register_policy
tools.contract: locally registered versioned OPA policy manifest; bundle attestation is not provided

tools.name: palo_verify_action_authority
tools.contract: normalized Action Claim and bound approval

tools.name: palo_resolve_approval
tools.contract: one terminal transition with a caller-supplied identity label and rationale

tools.name: palo_submit_evidence
tools.contract: prototype signed execution-evidence submission that assumes a trusted caller
